corrections.text: Five of the six cited sources (pv-magazine.com, pv-magazine-australia.com, renewableenergymagazine.com, energy-storage.news, solarquarter.com) were not on the project's source allowlist at submission time. All are reputable renewable-energy and storage trade outlets; the pv-magazine family in particular is the primary trade publication for IRENA reports. Manually verified by the Chief Editor against the snapshot content.
